title: ‘Hoppers’ Cast Guide: See the Faces Behind Pixar’s Animal Body-Swapping Movie
content:
Science technology meets fluffy animals in Pixar’s latest animated comedy adventure “Hoppers.”“Hoppers” are a group of scientists who have discovered a way to mind-hop into robot animal bodies. The plot follows animal lover Mabel Tanaka (Piper Curda), whose mind is transferred into a life-like robotic beaver to communicate directly with animals. Along the way, Mabel befriends charismatic beaver King George (Bobby Moynihan) and must rally the entire animal kingdom to face the imminent threat of habitat destruction, spearheaded by Mayor Jerry Generazzo (Jon Hamm). The all-star voice ensemble cast also features Meryl Streep, Kathy Najimy, Bobby Moynihan, Ego Nwodim and Dave Franco.“Hoppers” is directed by Daniel Chong and produced by Nicole Paradis Grindle, with an original score by Mark Mothersbaugh. The film is in theaters on March 6.Here’s a guide to the voices behind the animated characters of “Hoppers.”

Piper Curda returns to the Disney universe as the voice of Mabel Tanaka, a 19-year-old animal lover whose consciousness is transferred into a robotic beaver. Curda is best known for her starring roles on Disney Channel’s “I Didn’t Do It” and the hit sequel “Teen Beach Movie 2,” and has since appeared in “May December” and Netflix’s “American Pie Presents: Girls’ Rules.”

Bobby Moynihan voices King George, a beaver monarch whose authority is matched only by his insecurity. A longtime fixture of ensemble comedy, Moynihan spent nine seasons on NBC’s “Saturday Night Live” and has voiced characters in “Inside Out,” “DuckTales” and “Monsters University.”

Jon Hamm lends his voice to Mayor Jerry Generazzo, a slick and self-serving politician driven by greed and ambition. Hamm is best known for his Emmy-winning performance as Don Draper on AMC’s “Mad Men” and has recently appeared in FX’s “Fargo” and Apple TV+’s “The Morning Show,” as well as in films including “Top Gun: Maverick” and “Confess, Fletch.”

Kathy Najimy voices Dr. Sam, Mabel’s biology professor and the brilliant but morally conflicted scientist behind the hopping technology. Najimy’s career spans decades across film, television and animation, with credits including “Sister Act,” “Hocus Pocus,” “Veep” and the voice of Peggy Hill on Fox’s long-running animated series “King of the Hill.”

Dave Franco voices the Insect King, the calculating mate to the Insect Queen whose ambitions extend beyond his hive. Franco’s recent work includes Neon’s “Together,” Amazon MGM’s “Somebody I Used to Know,” “The Rental” and “Now You See Me 3.”

Eduardo Franco voices Loaf, a slow-moving but steadfast beaver. Franco broke out with his performance as Argyle on Netflix’s “Stranger Things” and has appeared in “Booksmart,” “American Vandal” and “The Afterparty.”

Aparna Nancherla voices Nisha, Dr. Sam’s loyal colleague at the top-secret lab. Before joining the animated world of “Hoppers,” the actor and comedian has leant her voice to characters in film and television shows including “The Great North,” “Bob’s Burgers,” “Orion and the Dark,” “Mira, Royal Detective” and “BoJack Horseman.” She has also written for “Late Night With Seth Meyers” and “Totally Biased With W. Kamau Bell,” amongst others.

Sam Richardson plays Conner, a cheerful biology graduate student in Dr. Sam’s lab. Richardson boasts a lengthy voice-acting resume, with credits on television shows like “Wylde Pak,” “Krapopolis,” “Bob’s Burgers,” “Sausage Party: Foodtopia” and “Velma.” His onscreen credits include “Veep” (as Richard Splett) and “Detroiters.”

Ego Nwodim voices the Fish Queen, described to be the boisterous, stern and formidable leader of the fish kingdom. Nwodim is best known for her work on “Saturday Night Live” from 2018, beginning with the show’s 44th season, to 2025, ending with the show’s 50th season. Nwodim also previously appeared in the TV series “Galactic War Room” and voiced characters for “Futurama,” “Baby Shark’s Big Movie” and “Diary of a Wimpy Kid Christmas: Cabin Fever.”

Nichole Sakura voices the Reptile Queens, a terrifying trio of almost identical snake sisters. Sakura is known for her roles as Cheyenne Tyler Lee in the NBC sitcom “Superstore,” Amanda in “Shameless” and Emily Davis in the horror video game “Until Dawn.”

Meryl Streep voices the Insect Queen, the most respected and feared member of the all-seeing and all-powerful Council. A three-time Academy Award winner, Streep’s most famous appearances include “Sophie’s Choice,” “Kramer vs. Kramer,” “The Iron Lady,” “The Devil Wears Prada” and “The Bridges of Madison County.” Streep holds the record for the most Academy Award and Globe nominations of any performer, with her career spanning over 64 films and 18 television projects.

Steven Purcell voices Amphibian King, a frog. A cartoonist, animator, game designer and voice actor, Purcell is best known for creating the media franchise “Sam & Max,” which includes a show, comic and game series. “Hoppers” isn’t Purcell’s first collaboration with Pixar; he co-wrote and co-directed “Brave” and developed “Cars on the Road,” a miniseries for the “Cars” franchise.

Bird King, a flighty, flippant goose, was voiced by actor Isiah Whitlock Jr.before he died at the age of 71 in December 2025. Whitlock was known for his roles in “The Wire” and other appearances in television shows and films including “Goodfellas,” “Chappelle’s Show,” “Pieces of April,” “Enchanted,” “Cars 3” and “Lightyear.” He was also known for his collaborations with director Spike Lee, which included “BlacKkKlansman,” “Da 5 Bloods,” “She Hate Me,” “25th Hour,” “Red Hook Summer” and “Chi-Raq.”

Vannessa Bayer voices Diane, a shark and feared assassin summoned to help the Council carry out their mission to stop Mayor Jerry. Bayer was a cast member on “Saturday Night Live” from 2010 to 2017, for which she was nominated for an Emmy Award. Bayer also previously appeared in “I Love That For You,” “Freakier Friday” and “Ibiza.”

Melissa Villaseñor plays Ellen, a menacing, though mostly just grumpy grizzly bear. The writer, comedian and actor is known for “Hubie Halloween,” “Ralph Breaks the Internet” and “Toy Story 4.” She also hosts the “Laughing With Myself” podcast.

Heidi Klum voices Diane in the German-dubbed version of “Hoppers.” Her character is referred to as Hai-Di, a pun on both Klum’s name and the German word for shark, “hai.” Klum is known for her career as a supermodel and later worked as a reality show judge on “Project Runway,” “Germany’s Next Top Model” and “America’s Got Talent.”
title_zh: 《Hoppers》演員指南：看看皮克斯(Pixar)動物換身電影背後的面孔
content_zh:
皮克斯最新的動畫喜劇冒險片《跳躍者(Hoppers)》將科學技術與可愛動物結合在一起。《跳躍者(Hoppers)》是一群科學家，他們發現了一種可以進入機器動物身體的心靈跳躍技術。故事圍繞著動物愛好者田中梅寶(Mabel Tanaka)（派珀·庫達(Piper Curda)）展開，她的意識被轉移到一隻栩栩如生的機器海狸身上，以便能直接與動物溝通。在這個過程中，梅寶結識了迷人的海狸國王喬治(George)（鮑比·莫伊尼漢(Bobby Moynihan)），並必須團結整個動物王國，面對由市長傑瑞·詹納拉佐(Jerry Generazzo)（喬恩·哈姆(Jon Hamm)）主導的棲息地破壞的迫在眉睫威脅。這部影片的全明星配音陣容還包括梅麗爾·斯特里普(Meryl Streep)、凱西·納吉米(Kathy Najimy)、鮑比·莫伊尼漢(Bobby Moynihan)、埃戈·諾迪姆(Ego Nwodim)和戴夫·弗蘭科(Dave Franco)。影片由丹尼爾·莊(Daniel Chong)執導，妮可·帕拉迪斯·格林德(Nicole Paradis Grindle)製作，音樂由馬克·馬瑟斯堡(Mark Mothersbaugh)創作。電影將於3月6日在電影院上映。以下是《跳躍者(Hoppers)》動畫角色的配音介紹。

派珀·庫達(Piper Curda)回到迪士尼宇宙，為田中梅寶(Mabel Tanaka)配音，這是一位19歲的動物愛好者，她的意識被轉移到一隻機器海狸身上。庫達以在迪士尼頻道的《我沒有做過(I Didn’t Do It)》和熱門續集《青少年海灘電影2(Teen Beach Movie 2)》中的主演角色而聞名，之後還出現在《五月十二(May December)》和Netflix的《美國派：女孩的規則(American Pie Presents: Girls’ Rules)》中。

鮑比·莫伊尼漢(Bobby Moynihan)為喬治國王(King George)配音，這位海狸君主的權威僅次於他的不安全感。作為喜劇團體的長期成員，莫伊尼漢在NBC的《週六夜現場(Saturday Night Live)》上度過了九個賽季，並在《腦筋急轉彎(Inside Out)》、《鴨子故事(DuckTales)》和《怪獸大學(Monsters University)》中為角色配音。

喬恩·哈姆(Jon Hamm)為市長傑瑞·詹納拉佐(Mayor Jerry Generazzo)配音，這是一位精明且自私的政治家，受到貪婪和野心的驅動。哈姆因在AMC的《廣告狂人(Mad Men)》中飾演唐·德雷珀(Don Draper)而獲得艾美獎，最近還出現在FX的《冰血暴(Fargo)》和Apple TV+的《晨間秀(The Morning Show)》，以及電影《壯志凌雲：獨行俠(Top Gun: Maverick)》和《坦白吧，弗萊奇(Confess, Fletch)》中。

凱西·納吉米(Kathy Najimy)為梅寶的生物學教授薩姆博士(Dr. Sam)配音，這位聰明但道德上有衝突的科學家是跳躍技術的背後推手。納吉米的職業生涯跨越數十年，涵蓋電影、電視和動畫，參與作品包括《修女也瘋狂(Sister Act)》、《鬼靈精怪(Hocus Pocus)》、《副總統(Veep)》以及福克斯長壽動畫系列《山丘之王(King of the Hill)》中的佩吉·希爾(Peggy Hill)的配音。

戴夫·弗蘭科(Dave Franco)為昆蟲王(Insect King)配音，這位計算周到的昆蟲王子與昆蟲女王(Insect Queen)的野心超越了他的蜂巢。弗蘭科最近的作品包括Neon的《一起(Together)》、亞馬遜MGM的《我曾經認識的某人(Somebody I Used to Know)》、《出租屋(The Rental)》和《現在你看到我3(Now You See Me 3)》。

愛德華多·弗蘭科(Eduardo Franco)為洛夫(Loaf)配音，這是一隻動作緩慢但堅定的海狸。弗蘭科因在Netflix的《怪奇物語(Stranger Things)》中飾演阿賈爾(Argyle)而成名，並曾出現在《書聰明(Booksmart)》、《美國破壞者(American Vandal)》和《派對之後(The Afterparty)》中。

阿帕娜·南切爾拉(Aparna Nancherla)為尼莎(Nisha)配音，她是博士山姆(Dr. Sam)在這個頂級機密實驗室的忠實同事。在加入動畫世界《跳躍者(Hoppers)》之前，這位演員和喜劇演員曾為多部電影和電視節目中的角色配音，包括《大北方(The Great North)》、《波布漢堡(Bob’s Burgers)》、《獵戶座與黑暗(Orion and the Dark)》、《米拉：皇家偵探(Mira, Royal Detective)》和《波傑克馬男(BoJack Horseman)》。她還曾為《深夜秀(Late Night With Seth Meyers)》和《完全偏見(Totally Biased With W. Kamau Bell)》等節目撰寫劇本。

山姆·理查森(Sam Richardson)飾演康納(Conner)，他是一位在博士山姆的實驗室裡快樂的生物學研究生。理查森擁有豐富的配音履歷，曾參與的電視節目包括《野性包(Wylde Pak)》、《克拉波利斯(Krapopolis)》、《波布漢堡(Bob’s Burgers)》、《香腸派對：美食烏托邦(Sausage Party: Foodtopia)》和《維爾瑪(Velma)》。他的螢幕作品包括《副總統(Veep)》（飾演理查德·斯普萊特(Richard Splett)）和《底特律人(Detroiters)》。

埃戈·諾迪姆(Ego Nwodim)為魚王后(Fish Queen)配音，她被描述為魚王國的喧鬧、嚴厲且強大的領導者。諾迪姆最為人知的是自2018年開始參與的《周六夜現場(Saturday Night Live)》，一直到2025年結束的第50季。諾迪姆還曾出現在電視劇《銀河戰爭室(Galactic War Room)》，並為《未來狂想曲(Futurama)》、《寶寶鯊的電影(Baby Shark’s Big Movie)》和《小屁孩日記聖誕特輯(Diary of a Wimpy Kid Christmas: Cabin Fever)》中的角色配音。

妮可·櫻花(Nichole Sakura)為爬行動物女王(Reptile Queens)配音，這是一組幾乎一模一樣的可怕蛇姐妹。櫻花因在NBC情境喜劇《超市(Superstore)》中飾演謝揚·泰勒·李(Cheyenne Tyler Lee)、在《無恥之徒(Shameless)》中飾演阿曼達(Amanda)以及在恐怖遊戲《直到黎明(Until Dawn)》中飾演艾米莉·戴維斯(Emily Davis)而聞名。

梅莉爾·史翠普(Meryl Streep)為昆蟲女王(Insect Queen)配音，她是全能全視的議會中最受尊敬和最令人畏懼的成員。這位三度奧斯卡獎得主最著名的作品包括《索菲的選擇(Sophie’s Choice)》、《克萊默對克萊默(Kramer vs. Kramer)》、《鐵娘子(The Iron Lady)》、《穿普拉達的女王(The Devil Wears Prada)》和《麥迪遜之橋(The Bridges of Madison County)》。史翠普擁有最多奧斯卡和金球獎提名的紀錄，職業生涯跨越了64部電影和18個電視項目。

史蒂文·珀塞爾(Steven Purcell)為兩棲王(Amphibian King)配音，這是一隻青蛙。作為漫畫家、動畫師、遊戲設計師和配音演員，珀塞爾最為人知的是創造了媒體特許經營《山姆與麥克(Sam & Max)》，該特許經營包括一部節目、漫畫和遊戲系列。《跳躍者(Hoppers)》並不是珀塞爾與皮克斯(Pixar)的首次合作；他曾共同編劇和共同導演《勇敢傳說(Brave)》，並開發了《汽車之路(Cars on the Road)》，這是一部《汽車(Cars)》系列的迷你劇。

鳥王(Bird King)是一隻輕浮、無所謂的鵝，之前由演員伊賽亞·惠特洛克(Isiah Whitlock Jr.)配音，惠特洛克於2025年12月去世，享年71歲。惠特洛克因在《火線重案組(The Wire)》中的角色而聞名，並在《好家伙(Goodfellas)》、《查佩爾秀(Chappelle’s Show)》、《四月的片段(Pieces of April)》、《魔法奇緣(Enchanted)》、《汽車3(Cars 3)》和《光年(Lightyear)》等電視節目和電影中有過其他出現。他還因與導演斯派克·李(Spike Lee)的合作而聞名，這些作品包括《黑色克蘭克人(BlacKkKlansman)》、《五個血(Da 5 Bloods)》、《她恨我(She Hate Me)》、《第25小時(25th Hour)》、《紅鉤夏季(Red Hook Summer)》和《芝拉克(Chi-Raq)》。

瓦內莎·貝爾(Vannessa Bayer)為角色黛安(Diane)配音，她是一隻鯊魚和令人畏懼的刺客，被召喚來協助議會執行任務以阻止市長傑瑞(Mayor Jerry)。貝爾曾是《週六夜現場》(Saturday Night Live)的演員，從2010年到2017年，並因此獲得艾美獎提名。貝爾還曾出現在《我愛你這件事》(I Love That For You)、《瘋狂星期五》(Freakier Friday)和《伊比沙》(Ibiza)中。

梅莉莎·維拉塞尼奧(Melissa Villaseñor)飾演艾倫(Ellen)，一隻雖然主要是脾氣暴躁但卻有些威脅感的灰熊。這位作家、喜劇演員和演員以《哈比萬聖節》(Hubie Halloween)、《無敵破壞王》(Ralph Breaks the Internet)和《玩具總動員4》(Toy Story 4)而聞名。她還主持著《與我自己開心大笑》(Laughing With Myself)播客。

海蒂·克魯姆(Heidi Klum)在德語配音版的《跳躍者》(Hoppers)中為黛安(Diane)配音。她的角色被稱為海迪(Hai-Di)，這是克魯姆名字和德語中“鯊魚”(hai)的雙關語。克魯姆以超模的職業生涯而聞名，後來擔任了《時尚新秀》(Project Runway)、《德國超級模特》(Germany’s Next Top Model)和《美國達人秀》(America’s Got Talent)的真人秀評委。
summary_zh: 皮克斯最新的動畫喜劇冒險片《跳躍者(Hoppers)》將科學技術與可愛動物結合在一起。《跳躍者(Hoppers)》是一群科學家，他們發現了一種可以進入機器動物身體的心靈跳躍技術。故事圍繞著動物愛好者田中梅寶(Mabel Tanaka)（派珀·庫達(Piper Curda)）展開，她的意識被轉移到一隻栩栩如生的機器海狸身上，以便能直接與動物溝通。
